overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player crosses a street and walks along sidewalks past holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture, eventually entering a covered walkway with dramatic red lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. A pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction as the camera moves under an elevated highway structure. The environment is illuminated by vibrant neon signs and holographic advertisements on surrounding towers.

tall buildings covered with glowing holographic advertisements and video screens

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, with a black metal fence on the right and traffic on the left. The orange BUGSNAX neon sign becomes visible on a building ahead, while holographic billboards illuminate the distant cityscape. The camera follows a pedestrian in yellow pants moving in the same direction.

approaching covered stairway entrance with red lighting visible beyond

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wider commercial street with the BUGSNAX sign now behind. The camera passes the DATA INC building with its blue neon signage and large concrete planters with palm trees. Further ahead, a pawn shop sign glows green, and a covered stairway structure marks the entrance to a darker corridor with red lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with intense red overhead lighting

events.description: entering corridor with intense red neon tube lighting overhead

agents.ego_description: entering a covered walkway illuminated by red neon lights, passing pedestrians seated at outdoor tables

entered.detail: overhead structure with intense red neon tube lighting creating a dramatic corridor effect
white plastic chairs and tables with large umbrellas arranged outside a building
large vertical concrete support columns for the overhead walkway structure

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow covered walkway bathed in intense red neon light from overhead tubes. The stairway structure remains visible to the left while the path ahead glows crimson. Outdoor seating with white plastic chairs lines the right side, and structural columns create a rhythmic pattern along the left wall as the camera moves deeper into the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city that transitions from a wide, vibrant intersection into a narrow, crimson-hued corridor. It begins by crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath an elevated highway, moving past holographic advertisements and a passing pedestrian under the glow of towering neon signs. As the camera proceeds along a covered sidewalk, it follows a pedestrian in yellow pants past a bright orange BUGSNAX sign and a black metal fence. The scene then opens onto a wider commercial street, passing the blue neon of the DATA INC building and palm trees in concrete planters before approaching a green pawn shop sign. Finally, the camera turns into a narrow covered walkway, where the environment shifts abruptly into intense red lighting from overhead tubes, passing white plastic chairs and rhythmic structural columns as it moves deeper into the corridor.
